caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, glasses, and a large, silver, textured wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, various framed photos and apparel items are visible on shelves, including a garment with "LEE" printed on it. To the left of the man, a logo for "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears on the screen, and similar red and white text reading "BOSS TALK JOY" is visible to his right. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and smiling, with his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks. His head tilts and his mouth moves, indicating an active conversation, while his posture remains relatively still in the chair.
